headerDisplay: Connect your Candy, Hoover, or Haier appliances to HomeKit via the hOn cloud platform.

name.title: Platform Name
name.description: The name that appears in Homebridge logs.

email.title: hOn Account Email
email.description: The email address you use to log into the hOn app.

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to check the appliance status. Minimum 30 seconds.

enableRemoteStart.title: Enable Remote Start/Stop
enableRemoteStart.description: Allow starting and stopping programs from HomeKit. Use with caution -- ensure the appliance door is closed and loaded correctly before remote starting.
